title: Scheduler
description: Fires off scheduled mob events at time of day events.

min_delay_secs.title: The minimum the scheduler will be delayed.

max_delay_secs.title: The maximum the scheduler will be delayed.

scheduled_events.title: Scheduled Events
scheduled_events.description: The list of triggers that fire when the conditions match the given filter criteria. Can be an array of event objects or a single event object.
